articles.author: Brenda Goodman, Francesca Giuliani Hoffman
articles.title: American passenger on hantavirus-hit cruise feels ‘blindsided’ and ‘misled’ by new quarantine orders - CNN
articles.description: An American passenger who was exposed to the Andes strain of hantavirus on the cruise ship HV Hondius said he feels “blindsided” and “misled” by new orders that require staying at the National Quarantine Center in Nebraska under federal supervision.
articles.content:
Summary
  • Some American passengers exposed to hantavirus on a cruise ship say they were blindsided by new federal quarantine orders.

articles.author: Lauren Weber, Lena H. Sun
articles.title: This U.S. doctor went to Congo to heal others. Then Ebola hit his hospital. - The Washington Post
articles.description: The American missionary doctor who contracted Ebola may have gotten infected while performing surgery on a patient for what he thought at the time was a gall bladder infection.
articles.content: Peter Stafford, a man of deep Christian faith, had been working as the only surgeon at a hospital serving a remote area of the Democratic Republic of the Congo when he began feeling sick Saturday. Th… [+76 chars]

articles.title: Elon Musk said Sam Altman "stole" a non-profit — but the trial showed he had similar aims - TechCrunch
articles.description: “By the end of this week, you and Sam will be the most hated men in America.”
